description: State-sponsored hacker group alleged to be run by the North Korean government. Known for cyberattacks since the 2000s, including the 2014 Sony Pictures hack and the 2016 Bangladesh Bank heist. Designated as an advanced persistent threat. Operates globally for espionage and financial theft.

country_links.evidence_quote: over 16 organizations in at least 13 countries between 2014 and 2021: Bangladesh, Chile, India, Mexico, Pakistan, the Philippines, South Korea, Taiwan, Turkey, and Vietnam
country_links.context: BlueNorOff, a unit of Lazarus, targeted financial institutions in Bangladesh, including the 2016 Bangladesh Bank robbery.

country_links.evidence_quote: Huione Pay, whose directors include Cambodian businessman Hun To, received cryptocurrency worth over $150,000, from a digital wallet used by North Korean hacking outfit Lazarus
country_links.context: The Lazarus Group received cryptocurrency from a digital wallet linked to Cambodian company Huione Pay.

country_links.evidence_quote: over 16 organizations in at least 13 countries between 2014 and 2021: Bangladesh, Chile, India, Mexico, Pakistan, the Philippines, South Korea, Taiwan, Turkey, and Vietnam
country_links.context: BlueNorOff targeted financial institutions in Chile.

country_links.evidence_quote: North Korean hackers are sent vocationally to Shenyang, China for special training
country_links.context: North Korean hackers are sent to Shenyang, China for special training.

country_links.evidence_quote: stolen US$12 million from the Banco del Austro in Ecuador
country_links.context: The Lazarus Group stole US$12 million from the Banco del Austro in Ecuador.

country_links.evidence_quote: a local cryptocurrency exchange named WazirX was hacked by the group and $234.9 million worth of crypto assets have been stolen
country_links.context: The Lazarus Group hacked Indian cryptocurrency exchange WazirX, stealing $234.9 million.

country_links.evidence_quote: successful $49 million theft from an institution in Kuwait
country_links.context: The Lazarus Group successfully stole $49 million from an institution in Kuwait.

country_links.context: BlueNorOff targeted financial institutions in Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit, based in Dubai, was hacked in what became the biggest crypto exchange theft to date
country_links.context: The Lazarus Group hacked Bybit, a cryptocurrency exchange based in Dubai, UAE.
The Lazarus Group's WannaCry ransomware attack hit the NHS in Britain.

country_links.evidence_quote: DDoS attack against US and South Korean websites
country_links.context: The Lazarus Group conducted a DDoS attack against US websites in Operation Troy.
